query: SELECT id, code, description FROM icd_codes WHERE code IN ('M23','M51','M75','M17','R51','E11','E10','I10','G47.33','K40','H25') ORDER BY code LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute 
SELECT id, code, description FROM icd_codes WHERE code IN ('M23','M51','M75','M17','R51','E11','E10','I10','G47.33','K40','H25') ORDER BY code LIMIT 20;
